given: The S3 down migration has been executed and stock table is in rollback state
when: We inspect the inventory_code column schema
then: The column has a NOT NULL constraint
architectural_notes: Infra: a contract on the stock data-store shape constraint (the Alembic down migration sets NOT NULL on the restored inventory_code column to match the original schema), proven by schema inspection or by attempting a NULL insert (which will fail). Owner: the Alembic revision in the repository/migration layer. Cross-cutting concern: reversibility (R4), the down path must restore all original constraints.

independence.rationale: AC1-5 test migration operations and data integrity; AC6 tests that the original schema contract is fully restored
